title: Front Office Manager - Lemon Tree Hotels - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Lemon Tree Hotels - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Lemon Tree Hotels in Dhanbad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Lemon Tree Hotels:
Lemon Tree Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lemon Tree Hotels!
